infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Nianza uses the microphone so you can speak to Patricia hands-free.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Nianza uses your photo library when you choose to add a child photo or share a photo with Patricia.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Nianza uses your camera when you choose to take a photo to add or share.
